summaryAm: ዝንጀሮ እና ሻርክ በባሕር ዳር ስለ ጥንቃቄ እና ብልሃት የሚማሩበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ፈጣን ማሰብ ከደግ ቃል ጋር ሲሆን ችግርን ያለ ጉዳት ይፈታል።

source.name: Traditional African folktale
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ዝንጀሮው በባሕር ዳር በዛፍ ላይ ፍሬ ይበላ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The monkey ate fruit in a tree by the sea.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Monkey and the Shark, page 1: ዝንጀሮው በባሕር ዳር በዛፍ ላይ ፍሬ ይበላ ነበር።

pages.textAm: ሻርኩ ከውሃ ወጥቶ “ፍሬውን ትካፈለኛለህ?” ብሎ ጠየቀ።
pages.textEn: The shark came from the water and asked to share the fruit.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Monkey and the Shark, page 2: ሻርኩ ከውሃ ወጥቶ “ፍሬውን ትካፈለኛለህ?” ብሎ ጠየቀ።

pages.textAm: ዝንጀሮው ፍሬ አወረደለት፣ ሁለቱም ጓደኞች ሆኑ።
pages.textEn: The monkey dropped fruit for him, and the two became friends.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Monkey and the Shark, page 3: ዝንጀሮው ፍሬ አወረደለት፣ ሁለቱም ጓደኞች ሆኑ።

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ሻርኩ ዝንጀሮውን ወደ ውሃ ሊወስደው ፈለገ።
pages.textEn: One day, the shark wanted to take the monkey into the water.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Monkey and the Shark, page 4: አንድ ቀን ሻርኩ ዝንጀሮውን ወደ ውሃ ሊወስደው ፈለገ።

pages.textAm: ዝንጀሮው “እኔ ዛፍ ላይ ደህና ነኝ፤ እዚህ እንገናኝ” ብሎ በብልሃት ተናገረ።
pages.textEn: The monkey wisely said he was safe in the tree and they could meet there.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Monkey and the Shark, page 5: ዝንጀሮው “እኔ ዛፍ ላይ ደህና ነኝ፤ እዚህ እንገናኝ” ብሎ በብልሃት ተናገረ።

pages.textAm: ሻርኩ ትንሽ ቆም ብሎ አሰበ። “እንግዲህ እያንዳንዳችን ከደህና ቦታችን መጫወት እንችላለን” አለ።
pages.textEn: The shark paused and suggested that each friend could play from a safe place.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Monkey and the Shark, page 6: shark and monkey calmly agreeing to play from their own safe places.

pages.textAm: ዝንጀሮው በየቀኑ ጥቂት ፍሬ ለሻርኩ ያወርድለት ነበር። ሻርኩም ከውሃ ውስጥ የባሕር ዜማ ይዘምርለት ነበር።
pages.textEn: Each day the monkey shared fruit, and the shark shared sea songs.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Monkey in a seaside tree sharing fruit with a friendly shark.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ሻርኩ “የእኔን ቤት እንድታይ እፈልጋለሁ” አለ። ዝንጀሮውም ውሃ ለእሱ ቦታ እንዳልሆነ አስታወሰ።
pages.textEn: The shark wanted to show his home, but the monkey remembered water was not his safe place.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Friendly shark inviting monkey near the water while monkey thinks carefully.

pages.textAm: ዝንጀሮው በደግነት “እኔ ከዛፌ ላይ እመለከታለሁ፣ አንተም ከውሃህ ውስጥ ታሳየኛለህ” አለ።
pages.textEn: The monkey kindly suggested they share from their own safe places.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Monkey on a branch speaking kindly to a shark in the water.

pages.textAm: ሻርኩ የባሕር ኮከቦችን እና ዓሣዎችን ከሩቅ አሳየው። ዝንጀሮውም ከዛፉ ላይ ቀለማትን በደስታ ተመለከተ።
pages.textEn: The shark showed sea wonders from the water while the monkey watched safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Shark showing colorful sea life while monkey watches from a tree.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ በኋላ ጓደኞቹ የራሳቸውን ቦታ ያከብሩ ነበር። ፍሬና ዘፈን በደህና መንገድ ይካፈሉ ነበር።
pages.textEn: After that, they respected their places and shared safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Monkey and shark happily sharing fruit and songs from tree and sea.
